description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring visible wood grain and metal rivets at the corners. The box is reinforced with horizontal wooden slats and has a flat, plank-style lid. Prominently stenciled on the top and one side in bold, dark letters is the warning 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY,' suggesting restricted access or sensitive contents. The wood shows signs of aging and use, with some discoloration and surface marks. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, giving it a utilitarian and secure look. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for heavy-duty storage or transport in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with stenciled 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY' text and reinforced slats, designed for secure, heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: Front-facing view of the box's long side, showing the flat wooden lid with stenciled warning text and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Short end view displaying the stenciled warning on the side panel and metal rivets at the corners.
description_view_2: Opposite long side view, again showing the reinforced wooden slats and the stenciled warning on the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite short end view, similar to view 1, with visible rivets and the warning text on the side.
